text:
CHAPTER 1: INTRODUCTION
The CP-200 is a centrifugal pump for industrial fluid transfer.
Operating range: 50-500 m3/h flow rate, up to 150m head.
Maximum temperature: 120 degrees Celsius.
Maximum pressure: 16 bar.

CHAPTER 2: BEARING MAINTENANCE
2.1 Bearing Types
The CP-200 uses SKF 6205 deep groove ball bearings.
Replace every 8000 hours or when vibration exceeds 7 mm/s.

2.2 Bearing Failure Symptoms
- High vibration at bearing defect frequencies
- Temperature above 80 degrees Celsius at bearing housing
- Unusual grinding or squealing noise
- Vibration at 3kHz indicates inner race defect at 2950 RPM

2.3 Bearing Replacement Steps
Step 1: Lock out tag out (LOTO) - isolate power
Step 2: Drain pump casing completely
Step 3: Remove coupling guard and coupling half
Step 4: Remove bearing housing bolts (8x M12)
Step 5: Use bearing puller tool BPT-200
Step 6: Clean shaft with lint-free cloth
Step 7: Heat new bearing to 80C with induction heater
Step 8: Press bearing onto shaft until seated
Step 9: Fill housing with Shell Gadus S2 grease (70% fill)
Step 10: Reassemble and run test

CHAPTER 3: MECHANICAL SEAL
3.1 Seal Type
Single mechanical seal, John Crane Type 1.
Silicon Carbide vs Carbon faces.
Maximum seal pressure: 10 bar.

3.2 Seal Failure Symptoms
- Visible fluid leakage at shaft
- Pressure drop greater than 15%
- Temperature rise at seal area
- Replace every 16000 hours or on failure

CHAPTER 4: VIBRATION ANALYSIS
4.1 Vibration Limits ISO 10816-3
Zone A (new machine)   : 0 to 2.3 mm/s
Zone B (acceptable)    : 2.3 to 4.5 mm/s
Zone C (alarm)         : 4.5 to 7.1 mm/s
Zone D (danger/stop)   : above 7.1 mm/s

4.2 Vibration Diagnosis
1x RPM vibration   : unbalance or misalignment
2x RPM vibration   : misalignment or looseness
3 kHz frequency    : SKF 6205 inner race defect
Broadband noise    : cavitation or turbulence

4.3 Corrective Actions
Unbalance    : dynamic balance impeller to G2.5
Misalignment : laser align to 0.05mm tolerance
Bearing fault: replace immediately if Zone C
Cavitation   : increase suction pressure

CHAPTER 5: TROUBLESHOOTING
Problem: Pump vibrating at 3kHz
Cause: SKF 6205 bearing inner race defect
Action: Stop pump, replace bearing immediately
Parts: SKF 6205 bearing, Shell Gadus S2 grease

Problem: Low flow rate
Cause 1: Clogged impeller - clean it
Cause 2: Worn wear rings - replace if gap above 0.5mm
Cause 3: Wrong rotation - check motor phases
Cause 4: Closed discharge valve - open fully

Problem: Pump overheating
Cause 1: Low lubrication - add Shell Gadus S2 grease
Cause 2: Bearing failure - replace bearing
Cause 3: Misalignment - perform laser alignment

Problem: Seal leaking
Cause 1: Worn seal faces - replace John Crane Type 1
Cause 2: Over pressure - check system pressure below 10 bar
Cause 3: Shaft damage - inspect and repair shaft sleeve
